name: I'm on a rocky beach by sea
description: I'm on a rocky beach by sea
hints: A rocky beach on the eastern shore. There are rocks here and the sea is accessible.
GET ROCK to pick up a rock - it might be useful. GO SEA enters the water.
GET ROCK picks up a rock (useful as a tool or weapon). GO SEA enters the water (room 11) but drops items. WEST returns to the sandy beach (room 5).
Pick up a rock here. WEST goes back to the main beach. Only GO SEA if you're prepared to swim.
notes: Rocky beach east of the main beach. GET ROCK picks up a useful rock. GO SEA enters water (room 11) and drops items. WEST returns to the sandy beach (room 5).
